title: 7 Herbal Tinctures For Pink Eye
description: Echinacea purpurea tinctures contains compounds like alkylamides, glycosides, and phenolic acids that have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. These properties can help alleviate pink eye symptoms by reducing inflammation and fighting off the underlying infection.  When using Echinacea purpurea tinctures for pink eye, take a few drops of the tincture in water three to four times a day. You can also apply a few drops directly to the affected eye.
